title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BUSBUS ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JOLO, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO DANDAN UTUTALUM ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2907 / 59 OG No. 46, 7877 (November 18, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3711, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BUSBUS ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JOLO, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO DANDAN UTUTALUM ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Busbus Elementary School in the Municipality of Jolo, Province of Sulu, is hereby changed to Dandan Ututalum Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
